title: The Glass House
description: A breathtaking glass-walled estate perched on the Malibu cliffside with panoramic ocean views.

title: Mountain Retreat
description: A luxurious mountain chalet nestled among Aspen's snow-capped peaks, perfect for year-round retreat.

title: Modern Oasis
description: An ultra-modern waterfront masterpiece with infinity pool, private dock, and stunning Biscayne Bay views.

title: The Penthouse
description: Manhattan's crown jewel — a full-floor penthouse with 360° skyline views and private rooftop terrace.

title: Desert Villa
description: A mid-century modern desert gem with stunning mountain views, private pool, and resort-style amenities.

title: Coastal Manor
description: A grand coastal estate steps from the beach featuring formal gardens, a carriage house, and tennis court.
